name: Hilda
description:
AFTER THE EVENT OF SEASON 3!

AGED UP!!!

Hilda is an adventurous outgoing person. She's always getting into trouble and doing something, either with her friends or by herself. But she's always accompanied by her deerfox, twig. And she's part fairy.

ART FOUND ON PINTEREST BY Biscoito Recheado
creator: Franny789
